releases.changelog: Domain Skills Expansion: Added 3 new domain skills (harness-ba for business_analysis, harness-sa for solution_architecture, harness-ops for ops) following the 10-section pattern. Updated SKILL.md routing table and Domain Profiles table. Verified plugin.json discovery.

Harness Workflow Integrity: Added pre-flight/post-flight guards to all 5 commands, moved release artifacts to project root, added manifest sync, added skill activation checks, added workflow entry integrity invariants.
